source.definition: To press a button quickly or to produce a short, sharp sound, often related to pressing a mouse button or a mechanical device.

explanation.sourceText: The English verb “click” is an onomatopoeic word that imitates the short, sharp sound made by mechanical or electronic devices when pressed or activated.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „click” este un termen onomatopeic care imită sunetul scurt și ascuțit produs de dispozitive mecanice sau electronice atunci când sunt apăsate sau activate.

source.additional: Formed from the imitation of the sound made by pressing a button or switch.

target.definition: A apăsa rapid un buton al mouse-ului sau a produce un sunet scurt, ascuțit.

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian expression “a da clic” is a calque from the English “to click,” which originates from the onomatopoeic root of the word.
explanation.targetText: Expresia românească „a da clic” este o traducere calchiată din englezescul „to click”, care provine dintr-o origine onomatopeică.

target.additional: Construction with the verb 'a da' (to give) and the noun 'clic'.

examples.sourceText: I click on the icon to open the program.
examples.targetText: Dau clic pe simbol pentru a deschide programul.

examples.sourceText: If you double click, the window opens.
examples.targetText: Dacă dai dublu clic, se deschide fereastra.

examples.sourceText: The computer makes a clicking sound when I press the button.
examples.targetText: Calculatorul face un sunet de clic când apăs butonul.

examples.sourceText: Don't click too fast, otherwise it won't work.
examples.targetText: Nu da clic prea repede, altfel nu funcționează.
Te rog, dă clic aici pentru a continua.

learningTips.text: Remember that 'a da clic' literally means 'to give a click'—think of giving a quick tap on a mouse button.
The Romanian word 'clic' sounds almost exactly like the English 'click', making it easy to remember.
Imagine the sharp sound a mouse makes when you click it—that sound helps you recall the Romanian 'clic'.
Connect the action of clicking with the sound 'click' which is the same in both English and Romanian.
